sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n92941" key="r(wpi/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥωπ-ίζω</orth>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ῥῶπος</etym>) perh. <sense id="n92941.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">deal in petty wares</tr_>, but variously glossed, Ion Trag.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0012.tlg001.perseus-grc1:31" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">31</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
